creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text: The minecraft-client port is only the loader that downloads the actual game and runs it. The 1.13.x and newer builds seem to use a newer version of lwjgl. If you set the version in your profile back to 1.12.x or older, I believe it will still work. I think the solution here is to update games/lwjgl, but it has changed a lot so that is not as trivial as one might like.
